Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Defendant To Accept The Wrongful Termination Summons And Complaint, Memorandum Of Points And Authorities, Declaration Of Gary Waite
Off Calendar Jan-29-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Gary M. Waite, Esq. 775-990-2097() for Plaintiff.
Patricia Ruiz Calzada, Esq. 925-237-1403 Law Office specailly appearing for Defendant.

ARGUED. Ms. Calzada states Defendant was not served. Mr. Waite informs a proof of service is on file. The clerk hands the Court the proof of service filed on 1/9/26. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

The Court adopts the tentatvie ruling.

PLAINTIFF GARY WAITE's Motion To Compel Defendant To Accept The Wrongful Termination Summons And Complaint.

The unopposed motion is granted.

A proposed order is submitted for the Court's review.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
